name: synapse-ai
description: Synapse AI — AI-Powered Customer Support Agent (RAG + multi-provider agent + immersive 3D UI)

scripts.deploy:setup: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.deploy:start: npm run migrate --workspace server && npm run seed --workspace server -- --if-empty && npm run start --workspace server
scripts.deploy:start:preseeded: npm run migrate --workspace server && npm run start --workspace server
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run migrate && npm run seed
